sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ نَادِرٌ الْحَاسُوبَ الْمَحْمُولَ فِي الْمَقْهَى.
sentences.translation: Nadir je otvorio laptop u kafiću.
sentences.translationEn: Nadir opened the laptop in the cafe.

sentences.arabic: اتَّصَلَ بِشَبَكَةِ الْوِاي فَاي وَبَدَأَ عَمَلَهُ.
sentences.translation: Spojio se na Wi-Fi i počeo raditi.
sentences.translationEn: He connected to the Wi-Fi and started his work.

sentences.translation: Pio je kafu i radio cijeli sat.
sentences.translationEn: He drank coffee and worked for a full hour.

sentences.translation: Završio je posao i zatvorio laptop.
sentences.translationEn: He finished his work and closed the laptop.
